About: It is about the torture and killing of a student.
Affects: It affects the investigation into a murder case.
AssociatedWith: It is associated with Jagiellonian University.
It is associated with the Vistula river.
It is associated with Robert Janczewski.
BelongsTo: It belongs to the category of cold cases.
CausedBy: It is caused by the murder of a student.
ConsistsOf: It consists of taped footage, interviews, and filmed re-enactments.
CreatedBy: It was created by HBO Max.
CreatedFor: It was created for exploring a murder case.
CreatedTo: It was created to retrace the events of a murder.
DiscoveredAt: It was discovered at the Dąbie barrage on the Vistula river.
DiscoveredBy: It was discovered by the crew of the tugboat Elk.
DiscoveredIn: It was discovered in late 1998 or early 1999.
HasA: It has a pilot episode set in January 1999.
It has additional episodes scheduled for future release.
HasFeatureOf: It is characterized by the dismemberment and skinning of a corpse.
It is characterized by the discovery of human skin on a boat's propeller.
It is characterized by the recovery of a right leg from a river.
It is characterized by the perpetrator having knowledge of dissection and preservation of skin.
It is characterized by the perpetrator having training in martial arts.
It is characterized by the perpetrator having a history of harassing women.
It is characterized by an incriminating letter from a friend.
It is characterized by blood found during a search.
It is characterized by a charge of aggravated murder with particular cruelty.
It is characterized by a finding of innocence by the principle of in dubio pro reo.
KnownAs: It is known as one of Poland's most notorious cold cases.
LocatedIn: It is located in Kraków, Poland.
OccurredAround: It occurred around late 1998 or early 1999.
PartOf: It is part of a docuseries.
PerformedBy: It was performed by the perpetrator using a sharp instrument.
ProducedBy: It was produced by HBO Max.
PublishedAs: It was published as a docuseries.
PublishedBy: It was published by HBO Max.
UsedAs: It is used as an example of a notorious cold case.
UsedFor: It is used for exploring a murder case.
UsedIn: It is used in a docuseries.
UsedTo: It is used to retrace the events through taped footage, interviews, and filmed re-enactments.

About: それは学生の拷問と殺害についてのものです。

それはロベルト・ヤンチェフスキと関連があります。

それは川から右脚が回収されたという特徴があります。

それは加害者が武道の訓練を受けていたという特徴があります。

それは特別な残虐性を伴う加重殺人の罪状という特徴があります。
それは疑わしきは罰せずの原則による無罪判決という特徴があります。
